## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] No sensitive/private data committed
- [ ] README/docs updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Repro steps included

## Validation

Paste command outputs or screenshots for:

- `ruff check .`
- `pytest -q`
- key CLI/API smoke checks
